Refining Your Offer
Module 3
The Launch Conversation is how you get
the copy and the offer right…
The Launch Conversation is how you get
the copy and the offer right…
• During your launch you’ll get a lot of feedback
from your market
• That’s one of the powerful things about PLF
• You don’t have to guess at what they’re thinking
• It allows you to deliver exactly what they’re
looking for
• Using the language they use – making it a lot
easier to sell

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
The Pre-Prelaunch is where you start this
launch conversation…
The Pre-Prelaunch is where you’ll get…
• Great engagement
• Information about what to include in your offer
• AND how you need to word it (using the actual
words they use)
Your Pre-Prelaunch Conversation includes…
• The responses to your Email Query (if you sent
one) on what questions people have
• The responses from your Shot Across the Bow
• General Survey Questions
• Testimonials if you used the Testimonial
Cruncher
• Comments left on Blog Posts or other places
where you asked for feedback or posted your
Shot Across the Bow
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
You want to enter the conversation that’s
already going on in your prospect’s mind.
Refining your offer…
• Take the words and sentences your prospects
use and drop it right into your copy when…
• Writing your Prelaunch and Open Cart emails
• Writing your Prelaunch Content (PLCs)
• Writing your Sales Video and Sales Page copy
Refining your offer…
• Modify or refine your offer to:
• Include teaching on the questions and
challenges they had
• Add bonuses to overcome any objections you
identified
• Example: Advanced product I offered…
• Newbies were interested as well
• Refined offer to add series of bonus coaching
calls for newbies
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Refining your offer…
• Use the testimonials gathered in the Testimonial
Cruncher:
• Add them to your Sales Video and/or Sales
Page
• Include them in your Open Cart emails where it
makes sense
• On your most powerful testimonials received,
consider requesting or shooting a short
testimonial or case study video
to show during Open Cart
The Launch Conversation can be powerful
• Biggest mistake people make is not listening to
your prospects
• Use the feedback to make your offer and your
copy reflect what your prospects actually want
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
